force_update_android.description: When true on Android, force update screen is shown if app version is below min_version_android

force_update_ios.description: When true on iOS, force update screen is shown if app version is below min_version_ios

defaultValue.value: A new version of FreshPass is required to continue. Please update from the store.

force_update_message.description: Message shown on the force update screen

android_store_url.description: Google Play Store listing URL for Android

ios_store_url.description: App Store listing URL for iOS — replace YOUR_APPLE_APP_ID with real App Store ID

version.description: FreshPass force update Remote Config template
